'''ât-k-w-t''' ('''shatakwetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neddylate|neddylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neddylate|neddylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-k-w-t
|-
! Lemma
| shatakwetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakwetoko|thitakwetoko]] || [[word:jitakwetoko|jitakwetoko]] || [[word:shitakwetoko|shitakwetoko]] || [[word:kitakwetoko|kitakwetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakwetoko|thuthutakwetoko]] || [[word:jujutakwetoko|jujutakwetoko]] || [[word:shushutakwetoko|shushutakwetoko]] || [[word:kukutakwetoko|kukutakwetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotakwetoko|thotakwetoko]] || [[word:jotakwetoko|jotakwetoko]] || [[word:shotakwetoko|shotakwetoko]] || [[word:kotakwetoko|kotakwetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakwetoko|thotakwetoko]] || [[word:jotakwetoko|jotakwetoko]] || [[word:shotakwetoko|shotakwetoko]] || [[word:kotakwetoko|kotakwetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtakwetoko|thĂŠtakwetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtakwetoko|jĂŠtakwetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtakwetoko|shĂŠtakwetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtakwetoko|kĂŠtakwetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakwetoko|thatakwetoko]] || [[word:jatakwetoko|jatakwetoko]] || [[word:shatakwetoko|shatakwetoko]] || [[word:katakwetoko|katakwetoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
